NASA Exoplanet Archive TAP

Exoplanet Archive

Search and sort measured worlds from NASA's composite exoplanet table. Cards and plot views combine orbital data, stellar metadata, luminosity-derived habitable-zone proxies, discovery-facility counts, and archive references.
